notes: I am a highly experienced Criminal Defence Solicitor with over 35 years’ frontline practice, Higher Rights of Audience, and full Duty Solicitor accreditation. I specialise in representing clients at police stations across Kent and surrounding areas, providing clear, calm and strategic advice at every stage of an investigation.  I also cover police station attendances on behalf of other criminal firms, offering reliable and prompt representation backed by strong advocacy skills and detailed knowledge of PACE and criminal procedure.
